title: Coverage Admission Policy
description: Pre-execution admission gate for coverage mutations. Admission before mutation. ALLOW/BLOCK/SHADOW/A4_REQUIRED/REVIEW_REQUIRED. Pattern: OPA admission control + Kubernetes admission webhooks.

rules.name: NEW_PROTECTED_UNKNOWN_FILE
rules.message: New file in protected path must have registry entry, exclusion, generated source_refs, or debt_id

rules.name: GENERATED_WITHOUT_SOURCE_REFS
rules.message: Generated file must declare source_refs and generated_from

rules.name: GENERATED_SOURCE_AUTHORITY_CLAIM
rules.message: Generated file cannot claim doc_source_of_truth, implementation_source, schema_source, or active_policy

rules.name: EXCLUSION_WITHOUT_REQUIRED_FIELDS
rules.message: Exclusion requires owner, reason, review_date, removal_condition

rules.name: DEBT_PARK_WITHOUT_DEBT_ID
rules.message: Debt-parked file must reference a valid debt_id in the debt ledger

rules.name: FIXTURE_WITHOUT_OWNING_TEST
rules.message: Fixture should reference an owning test or checker

rules.name: AUTHORITY_MUTATION_WITHOUT_REVIEW_ROUTE
rules.message: Authority domain/role change requires review route

rules.name: COVERAGE_STATUS_CHANGE_WITHOUT_RECEIPT
rules.message: Coverage status change requires batch receipt

rules.name: ADMISSION_REPORT_DRIFT
rules.message: Admission report is generated — manual edit detected

rules.name: ADMISSION_PASS_OVERCLAIM
rules.message: Admission pass cannot claim full closure
